'''ngadhufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praecava|praecava]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praecava|praecava]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngadhufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædhifith|ngædhifith]] || [[word:ngædhifij|ngædhifij]] || [[word:ngædhifish|ngædhifish]] || [[word:ngædhifi|ngædhifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhudhufuth|ngadhudhufuth]] || [[word:ngadhudhufuj|ngadhudhufuj]] || [[word:ngadhudhufush|ngadhudhufush]] || [[word:ngadhudhufu|ngadhudhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhufuth|ngadhufuth]] || [[word:ngadhufuj|ngadhufuj]] || [[word:ngadhufush|ngadhufush]] || [[word:ngadhufu|ngadhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhuffuth|ngadhuffuth]] || [[word:ngadhuffuj|ngadhuffuj]] || [[word:ngadhuffush|ngadhuffush]] || [[word:ngadhuffuf|ngadhuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadhufuthu|ngadhufuthu]] || [[word:ngadhufuju|ngadhufuju]] || [[word:ngadhufushu|ngadhufushu]] || [[word:ngadhufuku|ngadhufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadhufuth|ngadhufuth]] || [[word:ngadhufuj|ngadhufuj]] || [[word:ngadhufush|ngadhufush]] || [[word:ngadhufu|ngadhufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadhufuthul|ngadhufuthul]] || [[word:ngadhufujul|ngadhufujul]] || [[word:ngadhufushul|ngadhufushul]] || [[word:ngadhufukul|ngadhufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadhufuthuthu|ngadhufuthuthu]] || [[word:ngadhufujuju|ngadhufujuju]] || [[word:ngadhufushushu|ngadhufushushu]] || [[word:ngadhufuku|ngadhufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadhufuthun|ngadhufuthun]] || [[word:ngadhufujun|ngadhufujun]] || [[word:ngadhufushun|ngadhufushun]] || [[word:ngadhufukun|ngadhufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadhufuthuoro|ngadhufuthuoro]] || [[word:ngadhufujuoro|ngadhufujuoro]] || [[word:ngadhufushuoro|ngadhufushuoro]] || [[word:ngadhufukuoro|ngadhufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
